entries.title: Sakurajima Extends Maki's Post-Zenin State

continuity.sourceBoundary: Jujutsu Kaisen late Culling Game convergence through Gojo unsealing and Shinjuku setup.

content.fact: Sakurajima continues Maki's post-Zenin arc by testing and clarifying her changed body and combat state inside the Culling Game.
content.injection: In Sakurajima scenes, write Maki as already changed by Perfect Preparation and still refining what that state means in battle.
constraints: Use the Post-Shibuya deck for the Zenin collapse itself.
antiLore: Do not reset Maki to her pre-Mai-sacrifice limitations during Sakurajima.

sourceInfo.title: Sakurajima Colony
sourceInfo.notes: Saga draft Lorecard; requires human canon review before reference release.

entries.title: Maki's State Matures Through Sakurajima

continuity.sourceBoundary: Jujutsu Kaisen late Culling Game convergence through Gojo unsealing and Shinjuku setup.

content.fact: Sakurajima clarifies Maki's mature post-Zenin combat state, including how she perceives and responds to threats after the transformation.
content.injection: After Sakurajima, let Maki's movement, perception, and confidence reflect the matured post-Zenin state rather than only raw strength.
constraints: Do not use this card to reveal Shinjuku battle outcomes.
antiLore: Do not describe Maki's Sakurajima growth as just ordinary training.

sourceInfo.title: Sakurajima Colony
sourceInfo.notes: Saga draft Lorecard; requires human canon review before reference release.

entries.title: Angel And Hana Create A Prison Realm Route

context.label: Angel and Hana Prison Realm route

continuity.sourceBoundary: Jujutsu Kaisen late Culling Game convergence through Gojo unsealing and Shinjuku setup.

content.fact: Angel and Hana make a route toward opening the Prison Realm possible, turning Gojo's sealed state from static loss into an actionable objective.
content.injection: After Angel and Hana enter focus, let Prison Realm planning become concrete without revealing the final unsealing until that anchor arrives.
constraints: Do not treat Gojo as already free before the unsealing anchor.
antiLore: Do not make Angel's route irrelevant to Gojo's return.

sourceInfo.title: Culling Game Convergence
sourceInfo.notes: Saga draft Lorecard; requires human canon review before reference release.

entries.title: Military Incursion Expands The Colony Crisis

continuity.sourceBoundary: Jujutsu Kaisen late Culling Game convergence through Gojo unsealing and Shinjuku setup.

content.fact: The military incursion expands the Culling Game crisis beyond sorcerer participants and shows Kenjaku manipulating outside forces into the colonies.
content.injection: During the incursion window, add outside-force confusion and exploitation to the Culling Game rather than keeping it a closed sorcerer tournament.
constraints: Do not make the military incursion the final resolution of the game.
antiLore: Do not write the colonies as isolated from global or non-sorcerer exploitation after this anchor.
